creator: nsonack@herrhotzenplotz.de
text:
Created attachment 228977
patchfile

See patch attached.

I am not sure about the version of the port. It is not exactly 1.5,
because that is broken when building on FreeBSD. Instead I used a
specific commit where the upstream fix has been applied.

Also, credits to Steve Wills, who helped me debugging qmake trying
to strip a shell script in the install stage.

I will try to submit the patches upstream.

The port was tested with poudriere on the main branch of the ports tree
with 13.0-RELEASE-p4 amd64.
